description_long: This is a modern, rectangular house set on a spacious lot with manicured green lawns and a paved driveway leading to the main entrance. The structure features clean lines, flat roofs, and large glass windows, emphasizing a minimalist architectural style. The property includes a swimming pool and a separate glass-enclosed area, possibly a sunroom or greenhouse, adjacent to the main building. The house is surrounded by a low boundary wall and is accessed from a wide street, with a clear front walkway and steps leading to the entry. The exterior is predominantly white with accents of gray and natural wood, giving it a sleek, contemporary appearance. The layout suggests multiple functional zones, including outdoor leisure spaces and private living quarters.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with large glass windows, white exterior, and landscaped grounds, featuring a pool and a glass-enclosed area. The design is minimalist and contemporary, with clean lines and open outdoor spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, and landscaped lawn leading up to the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the glass-enclosed area and the pool, with the boundary wall and street visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, pool, and the back facade of the house with large windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the secondary entrance, more of the lawn, and the boundary wall along the street.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with wide steps, a flat overhang, and a minimalist door flanked by large glass panels
